positive: A whimsical, stylized forest creature composed of bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns, standing in a central pose. The creature should have a clean, simplified silhouette, reminiscent of Art Nouveau stained glass and modern tattoo flash. Use deep indigo, vibrant emerald, and phosphorescent teal accents against a minimalist cream background. High contrast, strong outlines, flat vector aesthetic with subtle gradients. Graphic novel ink drawing quality, perfect symmetry, designed for apparel repeat pattern.
